name: handoffpad
description: Local-first agent handoff bundle builder with redaction and validation.
author: Roger Chappel

scripts.smoke: node bin/handoffpad.js create --task fixtures/task.md --log fixtures/commands.log --output tmp/smoke-handoff.json && node bin/handoffpad.js validate tmp/smoke-handoff.json && node bin/handoffpad.js render tmp/smoke-handoff.json --format markdown
